what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment ledger entry that records an image attachment linked to the design-source channel, pointing to the image asset at image://design-source/capital-raise/p-03.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
The target uses an image:// URI scheme pointing to design-source/capital-raise/p-03.
It includes an added timestamp in ISO 8601 format.
The id follows the att- prefix pattern.
standouts: References a specific image asset p-03 under capital-raise in the design-source channel.
Contains no descriptive text or content beyond metadata.
Serves as a typed attachment record rather than a document.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Follows the channel-memory attachment id format att-<hash>.
Uses a channel field to associate the attachment with a communication channel.
Uses an image:// URI to locate the attached asset.
concerns: No alt text, caption, or title is provided for the image.
No provenance information such as author or source is included.
The target URI cannot be verified from this file alone.
No file format, dimensions, or size metadata is recorded.
notes: A bare metadata stub that links a design-source channel item to an image asset named p-03 in the capital-raise folder.
questions: What does the image p-03 depict?
Who added this attachment and why?
What is the actual file format, resolution, and size of the image?
Is the image:// URI resolvable and accessible?
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a durable, timestamped record that a specific image asset is attached to a design-source channel message or item.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped pointer from a channel context to an external image asset, which a fused system can use to retrieve visual design context associated with the channel.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata file for the design-source channel that points to the image asset image://design-source/capital-raise/p-03 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that an image asset is attached to a design-source channel item for later retrieval.
